data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## TDD Requirement
Task 2fe6-9f42 provides the RED test (test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id). This task turns it GREEN by replacing the CREATE-only filesystem check with ticket-exists.sh (via shim) which checks CREATE OR SNAPSHOT.

**Depends on**: Task 2fe6-9f42

## Critical: Shim Resolution in Test Contexts

When `run_gate_hook` in the test file cd's to an isolated temp git repo, `REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)` resolves to that temp repo — which has NO `.claude/scripts/dso` shim. Without a fix, all tests that expect exit 0 (tests 3, 9, 11 and any ID-matching test) would fail.

**Solution**: Add `TICKET_SHIM_OVERRIDE` env var support to the gate AND update `run_gate_hook` to export it.

## Implementation

### Sub-step 1: Update pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh

**Change 1**: After resolving REPO_ROOT (line ~127), add shim resolution:
```bash
# Allow test injection of shim path (TICKET_SHIM_OVERRIDE) to avoid isolated-git-repo issues
TICKET_SHIM="${TICKET_SHIM_OVERRIDE:-${REPO_ROOT}/.claude/scripts/dso}"
```

**Change 2**: Replace the validation loop body (lines ~144-153):

BEFORE:
```bash
for _id in "${TICKET_IDS[@]+"${TICKET_IDS[@]}"}"; do
    _ticket_dir="${TRACKER_DIR}/${_id}"
    if [[ -d "$_ticket_dir" ]]; then
        # Check for a CREATE event file in the ticket directory
        # shellcheck disable=SC2012  # Pre-existing: ls used for glob expansion with head — intentional pattern
        _create_file=$(ls "$_ticket_dir/"*-CREATE.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo "")
        if [[ -n "$_create_file" ]]; then
            # Found a valid ticket — allow commit
            exit 0
        fi
    fi
done
```

AFTER:
```bash
# Performance note: ~44ms per shim call vs <1ms direct FS. Acceptable for pre-commit budget
# because the gate exits on first match (typical commit pays this cost once).
# Performance SLO is owned by epic 2c28-e5b9 story 4c60-5e2e.
for _id in "${TICKET_IDS[@]+"${TICKET_IDS[@]}"}"; do
    if TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR="$TRACKER_DIR" "$TICKET_SHIM" ticket exists "$_id" 2>/dev/null; then
        exit 0
    fi
done
```

### Sub-step 2: Update run_gate_hook in test file
In `tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh`, the `run_gate_hook` and `run_gate_hook_stderr` helpers do `cd "$repo_dir"` to an isolated git repo. Export the real shim path as TICKET_SHIM_OVERRIDE so the gate finds the shim:

Find the two helper functions and add:
```bash
export TICKET_SHIM_OVERRIDE="$PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude/scripts/dso"
```
... immediately before the `bash "$GATE_HOOK"` call in each helper function.

PLUGIN_ROOT is already defined at the top of the test file as:
`PLUGIN_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"`

### Sub-step 3: Add to boundary allowlist
Add to `.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf`:
`plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh  # epic e1b2-2653 — calls ticket exists via shim`
(create file with header comment if absent; append if present)

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh (replace loop body, add TICKET_SHIM)
- tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh (update run_gate_hook helpers with TICKET_SHIM_OVERRIDE)
- .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf (add entry)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes — all 11 tests pass (10 existing + SNAPSHOT test)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'Results: 11 passed, 0 failed'
- [ ] test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id now passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh 2>&1 | grep -q '11 passed, 0 failed'
- [ ] Loop body no longer contains direct CREATE.json filesystem check
  Verify: ! grep -q 'CREATE\.json' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh
- [ ] TICKET_SHIM variable present in gate script
  Verify: grep -q 'TICKET_SHIM' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh
- [ ] TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR env-var bridge present in gate loop
  Verify: grep -q 'TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR.*TRACKER_DIR' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh
- [ ] Performance: gate run with valid ticket completes within 500ms total
  Verify: TRACKER=$(mktemp -d) && mkdir -p "$TRACKER/abcd-1234" && echo '{}' > "$TRACKER/abcd-1234/0001-CREATE.json" && TMPGIT=$(mktemp -d) && git -C "$TMPGIT" init -q 2>/dev/null && printf 'fix: abcd-1234 test\n' > "$TMPGIT/COMMIT_EDITMSG" && start=$SECONDS && (cd "$TMPGIT" && TICKET_TRACKER_OVERRIDE="$TRACKER" COMMIT_MSG_FILE_OVERRIDE="$TMPGIT/COMMIT_EDITMSG" bash "$(git -C "$TMPGIT" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)/../$(basename $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel))/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh" 2>/dev/null) || true && elapsed=$(( SECONDS - start )) && rm -rf "$TRACKER" "$TMPGIT" && [ "$elapsed" -le 2 ]
- [ ] Boundary allowlist entry present with epic citation
  Verify: grep -F 'pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh' .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf | grep -q 'e1b2-2653'

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
data.title: Replace direct filesystem check with shim call + allowlist entry in pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh
